Operation 'updateBrandedPhoneNumber' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. Added: (1) input schema reference and what fields can be modified, (2) clarification that this is a partial update (only provided fields change), (3) output schema reference, (4) side effect that changes are immediate. This helps agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Partially update a branded phone number registration
data.summary_suggestion: Partially update branded phone number configuration
data.description_suggestion: Partially updates a branded phone number registration with new configuration details. Accepts UpdateBrandedPhoneNumberRequest containing fields to modify (name, business profile, carrier features, etc.). Only provided fields are updated; omitted fields remain unchanged. Returns the updated BrandedPhoneNumberResponse with current registration details. Changes take effect immediately for active numbers.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. Added: (1) input schema reference and what fields can be modified, (2) clarification that this is a partial update (only provided fields change), (3) output schema reference, (4) side effect that changes are immediate. This helps agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'postCustomEvent' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, not_actionable. Original summary and description are too vague and don't clearly indicate the dual purpose (contact management vs. event creation). Added clarity about what inputs are expected, what is returned, and when an AI agent should use this operation. Improved actionability by explaining the operation's role in campaign workflows.

data.current_description: Create and update contacts or add events to contacts
data.description_suggestion: Create new contacts, update existing contact information, or add custom events to contacts. Accepts contact traits and event data in the request. Returns an event response confirming the operation. Use this operation to trigger contact lifecycle events or record custom interactions in your outbound campaigns.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too vague and don't clearly indicate the dual purpose (contact management vs. event creation). Added clarity about what inputs are expected, what is returned, and when an AI agent should use this operation. Improved actionability by explaining the operation's role in campaign workflows.

message: Operation 'sendMessage' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate, but description lacks critical details about inputs (phone number, content), outputs (message ID, status), and side effects (message queuing, carrier routing). Added information about delivery tracking and carrier integration to improve AI agent understanding of the operation's effects.

data.current_description: Send an SMS message to a recipient
data.description_suggestion: Send an SMS message to a specified recipient. Requires message content and recipient phone number in the request. Returns a message response with delivery status and message ID. The message is queued for delivery through the configured carrier and branded phone number. Delivery status can be tracked using the returned message ID.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks critical details about inputs (phone number, content), outputs (message ID, status), and side effects (message queuing, carrier routing). Added information about delivery tracking and carrier integration to improve AI agent understanding of the operation's effects.

data.current_description: Register a phone number for branding with carriers
data.description_suggestion: Register a phone number for carrier branding to enable branded SMS delivery. Requires phone number, business profile information, and carrier configuration details in the request. Returns a branded phone number response with registration status and carrier feature details. The phone number is submitted to carriers for branding approval and may take time to activate. Use this operation to onboard new phone numbers for branded outbound messaging campaigns.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear, but description lacks critical details about required inputs, what is returned, and the asynchronous nature of carrier registration.
